creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 226756
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 1.37 --> 1.41 (bugfix release)
Changes: https://github.com/mrscotty/connector/compare/1.37...1.41

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.16.3
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
